content.json:
# Trustee Filter Metrics

Success metrics for trustee filter usage and performance on the Trustee Management page.

**Instrumented events:**
- `Trustee District Filter Changed` — fired on any selection change; dimensions: `isDefault`, `selectedCount`, `resultCount`
- `Trustee District Filter Cleared` — fired when user clicks Clear (restores defaults)
- `Trustee Chapter Filter Changed` — fired on any chapter selection change; dimensions: `selectedCount`, `resultCount`
- `Trustee List Loaded` — fired when trustee data first renders; dimensions: `trusteeCount`; measurement: `loadMs`

---
## Usage Tracking
How frequently users modify the district filter and what they do with it.

content.title: % of Page Visits Where Filter Was Changed
Avg Filter Changes per Page Visit
% of Trustee Page Visits That Cleared Default Selection

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
| where tostring(customDimensions.isDefault) != "true"
| extend resultCount = toint(customMeasurements.resultCount)
| extend ResultBucket = case(
    resultCount == 0, "0 trustees",
    resultCount <= 5, "1–5 trustees",
    resultCount <= 10, "6–10 trustees",
    resultCount <= 20, "11–20 trustees",
    resultCount <= 50, "21–50 trustees",
    "51+ trustees"
  )
| summarize FilterApplications = count() by ResultBucket
| order by ResultBucket asc
content.title: Trustee Count Distribution After Filtering

content.json:
---
## Chapter Filter Usage
How frequently users apply the chapter filter and what results they see.

content.title: % of Page Visits Where Chapter Filter Was Used
Avg Chapter Filter Changes per Page Visit

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed"
| extend selectedCount = toint(customMeasurements.selectedCount)
| summarize FilterApplications = count() by selectedCount
| order by selectedCount asc
content.title: Chapter Selections per Filter Application

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed"
| extend resultCount = toint(customMeasurements.resultCount)
| extend ResultBucket = case(
    resultCount == 0, "0 trustees",
    resultCount <= 5, "1–5 trustees",
    resultCount <= 10, "6–10 trustees",
    resultCount <= 20, "11–20 trustees",
    resultCount <= 50, "21–50 trustees",
    "51+ trustees"
  )
| summarize FilterApplications = count() by ResultBucket
| order by ResultBucket asc
content.title: Trustee Count Distribution After Chapter Filtering

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ("Trustee District Filter Changed", "Trustee District Filter Cleared", "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed")
| summarize
    DistrictModifications = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Changed" and tostring(customDimensions.isDefault) != "true"),
    DefaultClears = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Cleared"),
    ChapterModifications = countif(name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed")
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Filter Activity Over Time (District + Chapter)

content.json:
---
## Performance Tracking
Filter response time and page load time for the trustee list.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee List Loaded"
| extend loadMs = todouble(customMeasurements.loadMs)
| where isnotnull(loadMs)
| summarize
    P50Ms = round(percentile(loadMs, 50), 0),
    P95Ms = round(percentile(loadMs, 95), 0),
    SampleCount = count()
| project
    ['P50 Load (ms)'] = P50Ms,
    ['P95 Load (ms)'] = P95Ms,
    ['Sample Count'] = SampleCount
content.title: Trustee List Page Load Time
